title: Guwahati、Assam — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Guwahati、Assam的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Guwahati是Assam的一個城市，人口約1,200,000。The largest city in Northeast India, a gateway to the Seven Sister states, known for its temples, wildlife, and Brahmaputra River.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
